source.name: volumeone.org
source.title: DECI , Water Street BID Plan New Events Ahead Of Eaux Claires

en.summary: DECI and Water Street BID announce new events ahead of the Eaux Claires festival.
en.why_irrelevant: Focuses on local arts and festival planning, unrelated to politics, crime, or AI.

zh.summary: DECI与Water Street BID宣布欧克莱尔音乐节前的新活动。
zh.why_irrelevant: 涉及本地艺术和节日策划，与政治、犯罪、AI无关。

brief: Tensions rise between Iran and the US as talks resume, while Asia braces for Typhoon Bavi. Research explores AI-assisted crime linkage, missing data visualization, and sign language recognition.
news_summary: A speedboat capsizes off Vietnam killing 15 including Indian tourists; former UK MP Ann Widdecombe may have been killed 24 hours before discovery; Typhoon Bavi hits Taiwan and China.
papers_summary: New papers examine how analysts use AI for crime linkage, propose visual analytics for missing data (ImputeViz), and introduce a multimodal smart glove for sign language recognition.

en.brief: Tensions rise between Iran and the US as talks resume, while Asia braces for Typhoon Bavi. Research explores AI-assisted crime linkage, missing data visualization, and sign language recognition.
en.news_summary: A speedboat capsizes off Vietnam killing 15 including Indian tourists; former UK MP Ann Widdecombe may have been killed 24 hours before discovery; Typhoon Bavi hits Taiwan and China.
en.papers_summary: New papers examine how analysts use AI for crime linkage, propose visual analytics for missing data (ImputeViz), and introduce a multimodal smart glove for sign language recognition.

zh.brief: 今日頭條：颱風巴威襲台中國撤離76萬人；德國華人跨國性侵案宣判。
zh.news_summary: 颱風巴威暴風圈進入台灣陸地，造成15萬戶停電，中國三地撤離逾76萬人。同時，德國宣判一起由中國籍男性組成的跨國性侵案，核心成員落網。
zh.papers_summary: 今日無重點中文研究論文。英文方面，有研究提出視覺化儀表板ImputeViz用於缺失數據診斷與插補方法比較。
